nasb.text: The Lord will strike you on the knees and legs with sore boils, from which you cannot be healed, from the sole of your foot to the crown of your head.

esv.text: The Lord will strike you on the knees and on the legs with grievous boils of which you cannot be healed, from the sole of your foot to the crown of your head.

cnv.text: 耶和華必用毒瘡打擊你的雙膝和雙腿，由踵至頂，使你無法醫治。

ccb.text: “耶和华要使你们从头到脚长满毒疮，无药可治。
